raw_sql:
SELECT 
    priority,
    category,
    state,
    COUNT(*) as count,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), 1) as avg_completion,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), 1) as avg_target,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) as completion_rate_pct
FROM flag_29
GROUP BY priority, category, state
ORDER BY category, priority, state;
template:
SELECT 
    priority,
    category,
    state,
    COUNT(*) as count,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), ?n) as avg_completion,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), ?n) as avg_target,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) as completion_rate_pct
FROM flag_29
GROUP BY priority, category, state
ORDER BY category, priority, state;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    category,
    priority,
    COUNT(*) as total_goals,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) as completion_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN percent_complete END), 1) as avg_pct_complete_when_done,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), 1) as avg_target
FROM flag_29
GROUP BY category, priority
ORDER BY category, priority;
template:
SELECT 
    category,
    priority,
    COUNT(*) as total_goals,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) as completed,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) as completion_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN percent_complete END), ?n) as avg_pct_complete_when_done,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), ?n) as avg_target
FROM flag_29
GROUP BY category, priority
ORDER BY category, priority;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    category,
    priority,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), 1) as avg_target,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), 1) as avg_actual,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage - percent_complete), 1) as avg_gap,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (end_date - start_date))), 0) as avg_duration_days,
    COUNT(*) as total
FROM flag_29
WHERE category = 'Cost Reduction'
GROUP BY category, priority
ORDER BY priority;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    priority,
    CASE 
        WHEN target_percentage < 65 THEN '< 65'
        WHEN target_percentage < 75 THEN '65-74'
        WHEN target_percentage < 85 THEN '75-84'
        ELSE '>= 85'
    END as target_bucket,
    COUNT(*) as total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) as completion_rate_pct
FROM flag_29
WHERE category = 'Cost Reduction'
GROUP BY priority, target_bucket
ORDER BY priority, target_bucket;
template:
SELECT 
    priority,
    CASE 
        WHEN target_percentage < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN target_percentage < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN target_percentage < ?n THEN ?s
        ELSE ?s
    END as target_bucket,
    COUNT(*) as total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) as completed,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) as completion_rate_pct
FROM flag_29
WHERE category = ?s
GROUP BY priority, target_bucket
ORDER BY priority, target_bucket;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN (target_percentage < 65) THEN '< 65'::text WHEN (target_percentage < 75) THEN '65-74'::text WHEN (target_percentage < 85) THEN '75-84'::text ELSE '>= 85'::text END

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    priority,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date)::int as start_year,
    COUNT(*) as total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) as completion_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), 1) as avg_target
FROM flag_29
WHERE category = 'Cost Reduction'
GROUP BY priority, start_year
ORDER BY priority, start_year;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    priority,
    state,
    MIN(end_date) as earliest_end,
    MAX(end_date) as latest_end,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), 1) as avg_pct_complete,
    COUNT(*) as total
FROM flag_29
WHERE category = 'Cost Reduction'
GROUP BY priority, state
ORDER BY priority, state;
template:
SELECT 
    priority,
    state,
    MIN(end_date) as earliest_end,
    MAX(end_date) as latest_end,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), ?n) as avg_pct_complete,
    COUNT(*) as total
FROM flag_29
WHERE category = ?s
GROUP BY priority, state
ORDER BY priority, state;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    priority,
    owner,
    COUNT(*) as total_goals,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) as completion_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), 1) as avg_target
FROM flag_29
WHERE category = 'Cost Reduction'
GROUP BY priority, owner
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
ORDER BY priority, completed DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    priority,
    owner,
    COUNT(*) as total_goals,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) as completed,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) as completion_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), ?n) as avg_target
FROM flag_29
WHERE category = ?s
GROUP BY priority, owner
HAVING COUNT(*) > ?n
ORDER BY priority, completed DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    priority,
    CASE WHEN target_percentage < 85 THEN 'Target < 85' ELSE 'Target >= 85' END as target_group,
    COUNT(*) as total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as completed,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) as completion_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG((end_date - start_date)), 0) as avg_duration_days,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state IN ('In Progress', 'Planned') AND end_date < CURRENT_DATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as overdue_stalled
FROM flag_29
GROUP BY priority, target_group
ORDER BY priority, target_group;
template:
SELECT 
    priority,
    CASE WHEN target_percentage < ?n THEN ?s ELSE ?s END as target_group,
    COUNT(*) as total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) as completed,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN state = ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(*), ?n) as completion_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG((end_date - start_date)), ?n) as avg_duration_days,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state IN (?s, ?s) AND end_date < CURRENT_DATE THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) as overdue_stalled
FROM flag_29
GROUP BY priority, target_group
ORDER BY priority, target_group;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    category,
    department,
    COUNT(*) as stalled_overdue,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), 1) as avg_actual,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), 1) as avg_target,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage - percent_complete), 1) as avg_gap,
    SUM(CASE WHEN target_percentage - percent_complete <= 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as near_completion,
    SUM(CASE WHEN target_percentage - percent_complete > 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as far_from_target
FROM flag_29
WHERE priority IN ('Critical', 'High')
  AND state IN ('In Progress', 'Planned')
  AND end_date < CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY category, department
ORDER BY stalled_overdue DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    category,
    department,
    COUNT(*) as stalled_overdue,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), ?n) as avg_actual,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), ?n) as avg_target,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage - percent_complete), ?n) as avg_gap,
    SUM(CASE WHEN target_percentage - percent_complete <= ?n THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) as near_completion,
    SUM(CASE WHEN target_percentage - percent_complete > ?n THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) as far_from_target
FROM flag_29
WHERE priority IN (?s, ?s)
  AND state IN (?s, ?s)
  AND end_date < CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY category, department
ORDER BY stalled_overdue DESC;

predicates: ((priority = ANY ('{Critical,High}'::text[])) AND (state = ANY ('{"In Progress",Planned}'::text[])) AND (end_date < CURRENT_DATE))
